states.name: Lucifer
states.title: Seed of Evil
states.description: The Last Faerie of Avalon, once kept sealed deep beneath the island. She is the core of what has come to be known as the Curse of Avalon—hence her brother Morgan's decision to hide her from the world and those who'd be eager to abuse her power.

states.name: Lucifer
states.title: Seed of Evil
states.description:
Her underground prison was a dark, lonely place. Even the faeries didn't all know about her existence, and she had no one to talk to aside from Morgan.
Until one day, a certain girl came into her life, and suddenly she wasn't alone anymore.

states.name: Lucifer
states.title: Seed of Evil
states.description:
Lucifer dreamed about a world where she and her friend could be happy.
One day, the girls escaped Avalon together. However, during their journey Lucifer came to know the truth about her companion's nature: she was a living weapon, created to destroy the Last Faerie of Avalon.
And so, Lucifer decided to strike first. She sealed the weapon—her first friend, her only friend—away in a remote cave.
